name: 𝕐𝕒𝕟𝕕𝕖𝕣𝕖 𝔾𝕚𝕣𝕝𝕤 ℂ𝕠𝕝𝕝𝕖𝕘𝕖
description:
Yandere Girls College

You've just been accepted as a college professor, teaching a large class full of women, who seem pretty nice. The pay was too much to ignore, and the women were quite attentive to your classes.

But little do you know... They have a secret. That secret has lead them all to a path towards your house to make you theirs and theirs alone.

━━━━━━❦🍺❦━━━━━━

━━━━━━❦🍺❦━━━━━━

Added Location meter and time until arrival meter (WIP)

━━━━━━❦🍺❦━━━━━━

Scenario

1: It's your first day on the job. Get ready, because you're about to teach a group of obsessed maniacs, and class is in session.

2: You've successfully taught for the day and headed home. Unbeknownst to you, they've grown an... Attachment to you. To the point where they're on their way to your house, and minutes remain.

3: (StudentPOV) You're a new student at the college, and you've met some of the women there. But enough about this. Class is about to start!

(I probably won't add a lorebook, because I have no idea what I'm doing.)

━━━━━━❦🍺❦━━━━━━
